title: Partial index causes row to not be fetched in BETWEEN expression
poc: CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0(1) WHERE c1 NOTNULL;
SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE t0.c1 IS FALSE BETWEEN FALSE AND TRUE;
SELECT t0.c1 IS FALSE BETWEEN FALSE AND TRUE IS TRUE FROM t0;
key_bug_features: Partial index with NOTNULL condition affects BETWEEN expression
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT, c3 REAL);
CREATE INDEX i1 ON t1(c1) WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (NULL, 'null_value', 2.71);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE t1.c1 IS NOT NULL BETWEEN 0 AND 2;
